original_image_tags: A rectangular ink stamp is visible in the lower right corner. The stamp contains the following text:

elements.description: Typed memorandum from Headquarters Fourth Air Force to U.S. Department of Justice dated 4 August 1947 regarding the investigation of 'Flying Discs', featuring a 'CONFIDENTIAL' stamp at the top and an FBI received stamp dated 'AUG 7 1947' at the bottom right.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the page contains a typed memorandum with stamps but no distinct photographs, sketches, or other visual content, and they describe the same type of stamps.
